PROSPECTUS SUPPLEMENT dated December 3, 2024 EAGLE POINT CREDIT COMPANY INC. $115,000,000 of Common Stock Up to 200,000 Shares of 6.50% Series C Term Preferred Stock due 2031 Liquidation Preference $25 per share Up to 4,500,000 Shares of 6.75% Series D Preferred Stock Liquidation Preference $25 per share Up to 1,000,000 Shares of 8.00% Series F Term Preferred Stock due 2029 Liquidation Preference $25 per share This prospectus supplement supplements the prospectus supplement dated February 23, 2024.
